bless your chart
  • about

173: WAB by category

gt_utils
Published

February 12, 2026

Load data

Code 
library(rlang)
library(cbbplotR)

wab <- readr::read_csv("wab_2025.csv")

# save function 
gt_save_crop <- function(data, file = NULL, bg = "white", whitespace = 50, zoom = 2, expand = 5) {
  tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".png")
  
  # Wrap the gtsave_extra call in a tryCatch to handle errors
  tryCatch({
    gtExtras::gtsave_extra(data, tmp, zoom = zoom, expand = expand)
  }, error = function(e) {
    # If there's an error, try using regular gt::gtsave instead
    message("gtsave_extra failed, trying gt::gtsave...")
    gt::gtsave(data, tmp, zoom = zoom, expand = expand)
  })
  
  magick::image_read(tmp) |> 
    magick::image_trim() |> 
    magick::image_border(bg, glue::glue('{whitespace}x{whitespace}')) |> 
    magick::image_write(file)
  unlink(tmp)
}

# function to find top wab
get_top_wab <- function(data, filter_expr, suffix = "", n = 15) {
  col_name <- paste0(suffix, "wab")
  record_name <- paste0(suffix, "record")
  
  if (!missing(filter_expr)) {
    data <- dplyr::filter(data, {{ filter_expr }})
  }
  
  data |>
    dplyr::group_by(team) |>
    dplyr::summarise(
      !!col_name := sum(wab, na.rm = TRUE),
      wins = sum(result == "W", na.rm = TRUE),
      losses = sum(result == "L", na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      !!record_name := paste0(wins, "-", losses)
    ) |>
    dplyr::select(-wins, -losses) |>
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(!!rlang::sym(col_name))) |>
    dplyr::slice_head(n = n)
}

overall_wab <- get_top_wab(wab, suffix = "")
home_wab <- get_top_wab(wab, location == "H", suffix = "home_")
road_wab <- get_top_wab(wab, location == "A", suffix = "road_")
neut_wab <- get_top_wab(wab, location == "N", suffix = "neut_")
non_conf_wab <- get_top_wab(wab, type == "nc", suffix = "non_conf_")
conf_wab <- get_top_wab(wab, type == "conf", suffix = "conf_")

q1_wab <- get_top_wab(wab, quad %in% c("Q1", "Q1A"), suffix = "q1_")
q2_wab <- get_top_wab(wab, quad == "Q2", suffix = "q2_")
q3_wab <- get_top_wab(wab, quad == "Q3", suffix = "q3_")
q4_wab <- get_top_wab(wab, quad == "Q4", suffix = "q4_")

# reduce to combine the data
all_wab_list <- list(
  overall_wab,
  home_wab,
  road_wab,
  neut_wab,
  conf_wab,
  non_conf_wab,
  q1_wab,
  q2_wab,
  q3_wab,
  q4_wab
)

all_wab <- purrr::reduce(all_wab_list, dplyr::full_join, by = "team")

# pivot it wider
all_wab_wide <- dplyr::bind_cols(
  overall_wab |> dplyr::mutate(rank = dplyr::row_number()) |> dplyr::select(rank, overall_team = team, wab, record),
  home_wab |> dplyr::select(home_team = team, home_wab, home_record),
  road_wab |> dplyr::select(road_team = team, road_wab, road_record),
  neut_wab |> dplyr::select(neut_team = team, neut_wab, neut_record),
  conf_wab |> dplyr::select(conf_team = team, conf_wab, conf_record),
  non_conf_wab |> dplyr::select(non_conf_team = team, non_conf_wab, non_conf_record),
  q1_wab |> dplyr::select(q1_team = team, q1_wab, q1_record),
  q2_wab |> dplyr::select(q2_team = team, q2_wab, q2_record),
  q3_wab |> dplyr::select(q3_team = team, q3_wab, q3_record),
  q4_wab |> dplyr::select(q4_team = team, q4_wab, q4_record),
)

WAB table

Code 
bball_header <- glue::glue(
  "<div style='display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;'>
      <div>
       <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/redesign/assets/img/icons/ESPN-icon-basketball.png'
       style='height: 40px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
     <div style='flex-grow:1; margin-left: 30px; margin-right: 30px'>
       <span style='display: block; font-weight: bold; text-align: center; font-size: 24px;'>Top Teams in Wins-Above-Bubble by Category</span>
       <span style='font-size: 14px; font-weight: normal; display: block; text-align: center;'><br>
       Shows the top-15 teams in WAB overall, by location, type, and quadrant.</span>
     </div>
     <div>
       <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/redesign/assets/img/icons/ESPN-icon-basketball.png'
       style='height: 40px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
   </div>
  <br>"
)

wab_tbl <- all_wab_wide |> 
  cbbplotR::gt_cbb_teams(overall_team, overall_team, include_name = FALSE, 
                         logo_height = 20) |> 
  cbbplotR::gt_cbb_teams(home_team, home_team, include_name = FALSE, 
                         logo_height = 20) |> 
  cbbplotR::gt_cbb_teams(road_team, road_team, include_name = FALSE, 
                         logo_height = 20) |> 
  cbbplotR::gt_cbb_teams(neut_team, neut_team, include_name = FALSE, 
                         logo_height = 20) |> 
  cbbplotR::gt_cbb_teams(conf_team, conf_team, include_name = FALSE, 
                         logo_height = 20) |> 
  cbbplotR::gt_cbb_teams(non_conf_team, non_conf_team, include_name = FALSE, 
                         logo_height = 20) |> 
  cbbplotR::gt_cbb_teams(q1_team, q1_team, include_name = FALSE, 
                         logo_height = 20) |> 
  cbbplotR::gt_cbb_teams(q2_team, q2_team, include_name = FALSE, 
                         logo_height = 20) |> 
  cbbplotR::gt_cbb_teams(q3_team, q3_team, include_name = FALSE, 
                         logo_height = 20) |> 
  cbbplotR::gt_cbb_teams(q4_team, q4_team, include_name = FALSE, 
                         logo_height = 20) |> 
  dplyr::mutate(
    dplyr::across(dplyr::ends_with("wab"), ~{
      val <- as.numeric(.x)
      
      bg_col <- dplyr::case_when(
        val >= 6.0 ~ "#2D6A4F", # Dark Green
        val >= 3.5 ~ "#52B788", # Medium Green
        val >= 1.5 ~ "#B7E4C7", # Light Green/Mint
        TRUE       ~ "#FFD60A"  # Yellow (1.5 and below)
      )
      
      text_col <- ifelse(val >= 3.5, "#FFFFFF", "#000000")
      
      sprintf(
        '<span style="background-color: %s; color: %s; 
        padding: 2px 4px; border-radius: 2px; 
        font-weight: bold; display: inline-block;
        min-width: 30px; text-align: center; font-size: 12.5px;">%s%.2f</span>',
        bg_col,
        text_col,
        ifelse(val > 0, "+", ""),
        val
      )
    })
  )  |> 
  gt::gt() |> 
  gt::fmt_markdown(columns = gt::ends_with("team")) |> 
  gt::fmt_markdown(columns = gt::ends_with("wab")) |>
  gt::fmt_markdown(columns = gt::ends_with("record")) |>
  gt::cols_merge(
    columns = c(overall_team, wab, record),
    pattern = "{1}<br>{2}<br><span style='font-size: 10.5px; color: gray;'>{3}</span>"
  ) |> 
  gt::cols_merge(
    columns = c(home_team, home_wab, home_record),
    pattern = "{1}<br>{2}<br><span style='font-size: 10.5px; color: gray;'>{3}</span>"
  ) |> 
  gt::cols_merge(
    columns = c(road_team, road_wab, road_record),
    pattern = "{1}<br>{2}<br><span style='font-size: 10.5px; color: gray;'>{3}</span>"
  ) |> 
  gt::cols_merge(
    columns = c(neut_team, neut_wab, neut_record),
    pattern = "{1}<br>{2}<br><span style='font-size: 10.5px; color: gray;'>{3}</span>"
  ) |> 
  gt::cols_merge(
    columns = c(conf_team, conf_wab, conf_record),
    pattern = "{1}<br>{2}<br><span style='font-size: 10.5px; color: gray;'>{3}</span>"
  ) |> 
  gt::cols_merge(
    columns = c(non_conf_team, non_conf_wab, non_conf_record),
    pattern = "{1}<br>{2}<br><span style='font-size: 10.5px; color: gray;'>{3}</span>"
  ) |> 
  gt::cols_merge(
    columns = c(q1_team, q1_wab, q1_record),
    pattern = "{1}<br>{2}<br><span style='font-size: 10.5px; color: gray;'>{3}</span>"
  ) |> 
  gt::cols_merge(
    columns = c(q2_team, q2_wab, q2_record),
    pattern = "{1}<br>{2}<br><span style='font-size: 10.5px; color: gray;'>{3}</span>"
  ) |> 
  gt::cols_merge(
    columns = c(q3_team, q3_wab, q3_record),
    pattern = "{1}<br>{2}<br><span style='font-size: 10.5px; color: gray;'>{3}</span>"
  ) |> 
  gt::cols_merge(
    columns = c(q4_team, q4_wab, q4_record),
    pattern = "{1}<br>{2}<br><span style='font-size: 10.5px; color: gray;'>{3}</span>"
  ) |> 
  gtUtils::gt_theme_savant() |> 
  gt::cols_add(overall_gap = "", .before = home_team) |>
  gt::cols_add(type_gap = "", .before = conf_team) |>
  gt::cols_add(quad_gap = "", .before = q1_team) |>
  gtUtils::gt_column_subheaders(
    overall_team = list(heading = "Overall", subtitle = "WAB (W-L)"),
    home_team = list(heading = "Home", subtitle = "WAB (W-L)"),
    road_team = list(heading = "Away", subtitle = "WAB (W-L)"),
    neut_team = list(heading = "Neutral", subtitle = "WAB (W-L)"),
    conf_team = list(heading = "Conf", subtitle = "WAB (W-L)"),
    non_conf_team = list(heading = "Non-Conf", subtitle = "WAB (W-L)"),
    q1_team = list(heading = "Q1", subtitle = "WAB (W-L)"),
    q2_team = list(heading = "Q2", subtitle = "WAB (W-L)"),
    q3_team = list(heading = "Q3", subtitle = "WAB (W-L)"),
    q4_team = list(heading = "Q4", subtitle = "WAB (W-L)"),
    heading_color = "black",
    subtitle_color = "gray"
  ) |> 
  gt::cols_label(
    rank = "",
    overall_gap = "",
    type_gap = "",
    quad_gap = ""
  ) |> 
  gt::tab_header(title = gt::html(bball_header)) |>
  gt::tab_source_note(
    source_note =
      gt::html(
        "<hr>
        WAB calculated using Torvik ratings and quadrants defined by NCAA's NET rankings<br><br>
        Data via barttorvik.com through February 11, 2026 games | theme via {gtUtils} <br>
        <hr><b>Table by Chris at Bless your chart</b><hr>"
      )
  ) |>
  gt::tab_options(
    table.width = gt::px(650),
    table.font.size = gt::px(12.5),
    column_labels.font.size = gt::px(14),
    source_notes.font.size = gt::px(10),
    heading.title.font.size = gt::px(16),
    table.border.bottom.color = "black"
  ) |> 
  gt::tab_spanner(label = "Location", columns = c(home_team, road_team, neut_team)) |> 
  gt::tab_spanner(label = "Type", columns = c(conf_team, non_conf_team)) |> 
  gt::tab_spanner(label = "Quadrant", columns = gt::starts_with("q")) |> 
  gt::tab_style(
    style = list(gt::cell_borders(
      sides = c("left", "right", "bottom", "top"),
      color = "black",
      weight = gt::px(1)
    )),
    locations = list(
      gt::cells_body()
    )
  )

gt_save_crop(wab_tbl,
             file = "wab_tbl.png",
             whitespace = 60,
             bg = "white")

wab_tbl
Top Teams in Wins-Above-Bubble by Category
Shows the top-15 teams in WAB overall, by location, type, and quadrant.

WAB calculated using Torvik ratings and quadrants defined by NCAA's NET rankings

Data via barttorvik.com through February 11, 2026 games | theme via {gtUtils}
Table by Chris at Bless your chart
